name: ORANGES AND SABJA SMOOTHIE
intro: This plant-based smoothie is like drinking sunshine in a glass. Basil or sabja seeds puff up like chia seeds and lend this milk-and-sugar-free smoothie a textured body. It’s loaded with antioxidants and ideal for hydration pre- or post-workout.

ingredients.item: basil seeds (soaked in water for 20 minutes)

method: In a blender, combine the orange juice, banana, coconut water, almond butter and ice cubes. Blend it into a thick shake.
Transfer the smoothie into serving glasses and top it with the puffed-up basil seeds. Serve chilled.
